features: Receive and process audio recordings from external teams
Support integration with S3 or similar cloud storage for content retrieval
Authenticate and access shared media links securely
Automate the extraction of recording content for further processing or analysis

workflows.name: External Recording Processing Workflow
steps: Receive request from another team for processing a recording
Obtain the recording access link (e.g., S3 bucket URL)
Authenticate and retrieve the recording from the given link
Process and transcribe/handle the recording as required
Return results or status to the requesting team

business_rules: All external recording requests must provide a valid and accessible link
Recordings are processed only after successful authentication and access
Results or processing status must be communicated back to the requesting team

domain_concepts.name: Domain Agent
domain_concepts.description: A service or application responsible for processing received recordings or media content, especially from external sources.

domain_concepts.name: External Link Access
domain_concepts.description: Capability to connect to, authenticate, and download content from a given remote storage location such as an S3 bucket.

domain_concepts.name: Processing Request
domain_concepts.description: A formal request by another team or user to process and handle a provided recording.
